headline: T. Rowe Price Targets Growth In Alternative Credit And Retirement Solutions
summary: T. Rowe Price Group (NasdaqGS:TROW) has introduced the OHA Flexible Credit Income Fund, a new multi strategy credit vehicle providing access to alternative credit. The firm has also expanded its retirement strategy leadership team, adding senior roles focused on retirement-focused products and solutions. These developments come as investors continue to look beyond traditional stocks and bonds and as retirement planning remains a core focus for many clients. T. Rowe Price is known for its...
